# Symlink Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-symlink
kind: Symlink
spec:
    path: example
    target: example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Symlink
spec:
  path: /usr/bin/runc
  target: /usr/local/sbin/runc
  force: true
```
